steps.label: Kubeflow Pipelines • one run per iter
open latest run
steps.description: Click into the most recent KFP run — last autoresearch iter.

steps.label: preprocess → train → evaluate • all green
steps.description: Settle on the DAG so the 3 green nodes are visible.

steps.label: preprocess logs
steps.description: Real logs from the step container — proves this is a real K8s execution, not a mock.
Don't click 'Metrics' here — KFP's train node doesn't surface metrics. Metrics flow from evaluate → MLflow. The trust receipt for THIS scene is the KFP run ID + green nodes.

steps.label: promotion decision in logs
steps.description: evaluate.py logs whether AUC beat the current @champion. If yes, it sets the alias — that's what triggers the GitOps chain.
